sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115585" key="yeudupobolimai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδ-υποβολιμαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n115585.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">falsely held to be supposititious</tr_>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ Ψευδυπ.</foreign> name of plays by Crobylus and <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.Jun.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
